description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the boileaum/debian-jupyter Docker image and runs only on the master branch. Define a pages job that runs in the default stage, executes the shell commands 'scripts/make_slides.sh --url', 'scripts/make_archive.sh --zip', and 'cp ponte-J*.zip public/', and publishes the 'public' directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. The job should be tagged with docker and pages runners.
